name: Brokaw
description_short: Brokaw Credit Union is a Wisconsin-based credit union serving 9 counties with checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and mobile banking for members.
description_long: Brokaw Credit Union has operated for 70 years as a member-owned financial cooperative serving Marathon, Lincoln, Portage, Langlade, Shawano, Waupaca, Clark, Taylor, and Wood Counties in Wisconsin. The credit union offers a full range of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, auto/RV loans, mortgages, and share certificates, accessible through online and mobile banking platforms. The institution distinguishes itself through its community-focused "people helping people" philosophy, reflected in 70 years of community donations, volunteerism, and sponsorships. Member eligibility is geographically limited to residents and employees of specified Wisconsin counties, or immediate family members of current members, which creates a tightly-defined membership base. Brokaw emphasizes affordable rates and local service, with current offerings including 4-year share certificates at 3.03% APY and auto/RV loans as low as 4.94% APR. The credit union maintains a network of surcharge-free ATMs and provides a mobile app for account management. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Brokaw operates on a non-profit cooperative model where members are owners. The institution is undergoing facility remodeling, as noted on their website. Overall, Brokaw represents a stable, community-oriented option for qualifying members in rural Wisconsin, with straightforward product offerings and competitive rates, though membership is restricted by geography.
services: Checking accounts with free ATM/debit cards and CardValet access
Savings accounts and share certificates (4-year term at 3.03% APY advertised)
Auto and RV loans (72-month terms as low as 4.94% APR)
Mortgages for home purchase and refinance
Mobile banking app with check deposit, balance view, and transaction history
pros: Low minimum deposit requirement ($5) to open membership and primary savings account
Competitive rates: 4-year share certificates at 3.03% APY and auto loans as low as 4.94% APR
Access to surcharge-free ATM network across service area
Full-service offerings including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and mobile banking
70-year history of community involvement and member-focused service
Mobile app for deposit checks, balance viewing, and transaction management
"Once a member, always a member" policy allowing members to retain membership indefinitely
cons: Membership limited to 9 specific Wisconsin counties; not available nationwide or online
Geographic restriction means ineligible applicants cannot join regardless of interest
Limited information on website regarding account fees, minimum balance requirements, or full product details
Ongoing facility remodeling may disrupt service at branch locations
No mention of business banking, investment services, or wealth management products
best_for: Wisconsin residents and employees in Marathon, Lincoln, Portage, Langlade, Shawano, Waupaca, Clark, Taylor, or Wood Counties seeking local banking
Members prioritizing community-oriented credit unions over large national banks
Auto/RV buyers in the service area looking for competitive loan rates
Existing members' immediate family members who want to join a cooperative financial institution
diagnosis: Brokaw Credit Union is best for residents and employees of nine specific Wisconsin counties seeking a local, community-focused alternative to national banks with competitive loan rates and full-service banking. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership eligibility—applicants outside the service area cannot join regardless of product interest, making this institution inaccessible to most U.S. consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Brokaw — Credit Union in Weston, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Brokaw — NCUA-insured credit union in Weston, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
